text.title: Kubernetes Resource Requests and Limits Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply `Kubernetes Resource Requests and Limits` end-to-end. Each step has an input, an action, an output, and (where relevant) a decision gate.

step.name: observe
step.input: Metrics over at least 1 full traffic cycle.
step.action: Record CPU p95 + memory p99 (and p100 peaks).

step.name: set-values
step.action: Apply rule-set: requests from p95/p99; memory limit per QoS; CPU limit at least 2x request or omitted.

step.name: deploy-and-watch
step.action: Roll out; watch p99 latency + OOM events for 1 cycle.
